title: Egyptian Raclette Delight
description: A unique twist on raclette, this Egyptian-inspired dish is perfect for a gluten-free dinner or snack. The intense flavors of the spices pair beautifully with the creamy raclette cheese.
instructions: Slice the raclette cheese into thin pieces and place on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the intense spice blend over the cheese and drizzle with yuzu juice.
Bake in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Meanwhile, toast the pita bread in the oven for 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
Remove the cheese from the oven and let cool for a minute or two.
Assemble the raclette by placing a piece of toasted pita bread on a plate, topping with a piece of raclette cheese, and garnishing with fresh parsley.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and serve immediately.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
